data.body: MAJOR PROGRESS (session 2): CLOSED+SIGNED this session: 8903 (auto-deploy, live on box), S4/perky-art-yodel (feature-branch docs, change 237 merged). LANDED via Gerrit: 229/230/231 (auto-deploy+lint), 236/fern (exclude feature/** from mirror CI), 237 (S4 docs), 239 (S3 evidence, landing). S3/will-tile-plum: all 6 ACs proven live (AC4 vote-carry: change 234 PS3 MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE -> LLM-Review 'Copied Votes' CARRIED + Verified re-dispatched run 28682539519; AC5 concurrency: 234 PS1 run 28681518772 CANCELLED by PS2). COMPLETION-VERIFIER LEARNING: it requires run-log evidence as a COMMITTED repo artifact, not just ticket comments -> created docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md (change 239) capturing S3 AC1-AC5; re-closing S3 after it lands. This evidence-file pattern is REQUIRED for S5 too. REMAINING: S5/leafy-vogue-ingot (7-scenario live E2E + committed reviewbot-e2e scenario script + committed evidence — bot is now S2-ready; scenario 4 already proven=S3 AC4, scenario 3 partial=S3 AC3, scenario 7 partial=S1/S2), S6/norm-dam-swab (policy+backout+cost from S5), follow-ups spy-luge-wool (-1/INDETERMINATE root-cause via /joe-debug) + merge_change_409_guard event (S2). Box state: auto-deploy live+healthy, review-bot=S2, gerrit untouched, deploy_errors alarm applied.
